commits.content:
{
  "name": "FJob",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "scripts": {
    "ng": "ng",
    "start": "ng serve",
    "build": "ng build --configuration development",
    "build:prod": "ng build --build-optimizer --configuration",
    "watch": "ng build --watch --configuration development",
    "test": "ng test"
  },
  "private": true,
  "dependencies": {
    "@angular/animations": "^15.1.0",
    "@angular/cdk": "^15.1.0",
    "@angular/common": "^15.1.0",
    "@angular/compiler": "^15.1.0",
    "@angular/core": "^15.1.0",
    "@angular/forms": "^15.1.0",
    "@angular/google-maps": "^14.1.0",
    "@angular/material": "^14.2.7",
    "@angular/platform-browser": "^15.1.0",
    "@angular/platform-browser-dynamic": "^15.1.0",
    "@angular/router": "^15.1.0",
    "@coreui/angular": "^4.4.9",
    "@fontsource/montserrat": "^4.5.13",
    "@fortawesome/angular-fontawesome": "^0.12.1",
    "@fullcalendar/angular": "^6.1.9",
    "@fullcalendar/core": "^6.1.9",
    "@fullcalendar/daygrid": "^6.1.9",
    "@fullcalendar/interaction": "^6.1.10",
    "@fullcalendar/timegrid": "^6.1.10",
    "@ngx-translate/core": "^13.0.0",
    "@ngx-translate/http-loader": "^6.0.0",
    "@stomp/stompjs": "^7.0.0",
    "angular-highcharts": "^15.0.1",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.14",
    "axios": "^1.6.7",
    "bootstrap": "^5.2.0",
    "cheerio": "^1.0.0-rc.12",
    "file-saver": "^2.0.5",
    "font-awesome": "^4.7.0",
    "highcharts": "^10.3.3",
    "highcharts-angular": "^3.1.2",
    "jquery": "^3.6.3",
    "messageformat": "^2.3.0",
    "ngx-bootstrap": "^10.2.0",
    "ngx-translate-messageformat-compiler": "^4.11.0",
    "postcss": "^8.4.24",
    "rxjs": "~7.5.0",
    "save": "^2.9.0",
    "socket.io-client": "^4.7.2",
    "sockjs-client": "^1.6.1",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.3.2",
    "tslib": "^2.3.0",
    "xlsx": "^0.18.5",
    "zone.js": "~0.11.4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@angular-devkit/build-angular": "^15.1.1",
    "@angular/cli": "~15.1.1",
    "@angular/compiler-cli": "^15.1.0",
    "@types/file-saver": "^2.0.5",
    "@types/highcharts": "^7.0.0",
    "@types/jasmine": "~4.0.0",
    "@types/jquery": "^3.5.16",
    "@types/sockjs-client": "^1.5.4",
    "jasmine-core": "~4.1.0",
    "karma": "~6.3.0",
    "karma-chrome-launcher": "~3.1.0",
    "karma-coverage": "~2.2.0",
    "karma-jasmine": "~5.0.0",
    "karma-jasmine-html-reporter": "~1.7.0",
    "typescript": "~4.9.4"
  }
}
